creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I just checked your website.  And I am not 100 % sure it meets the
requirements to be included in our list.  Why?  Because it only talks
about "SuSe Linux" and "Windows XP/7".  But nowhere it mentiones that
FreeBSD can also be preinstalled by your company (as it was said in the
initial PR).

Best regards

Johann Kois

-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
